heading: Increased micro-purchase threshold for certain procurements
label: 424 Increased micro-purchase threshold for certain procurements
text: In the administration of with respect to a procurement referred to in , the amount specified in subsections (a), (d), and (e) of such section 1902 shall be deemed to be $7,500.section 1902 of title 41section 422 of this title
